behavior_in_task_description.reason: The instruction names the file path (src/bun.js/bindings/FormatStackTraceForJS.cpp), the function (errorConstructorFuncCaptureStackTrace), and all key API calls (hasMaterializedErrorInfo, computeErrorInfoToJSValue, putDirect, setStackFrames, deleteProperty, putDirectCustomAccessor, RETURN_IF_EXCEPTION) that the tests check for. no_solution_leakage.reason: The instruction.md essentially specifies the exact fix: use a positive hasMaterializedErrorInfo() conditional with if/else, put computeErrorInfoToJSValue and putDirect in the materialized path, put setStackFrames/deleteProperty/putDirectCustomAccessor in the else path. This is not just describing what's broken — it's a detailed implementation specification that tells the agent exactly what to write.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on very specific implementation details: positive hasMaterializedErrorInfo conditional (not negated), putDirect in the if-body, computeErrorInfoToJSValue in the if-body, setStackFrames NOT in the if-body, else branch existence, etc. An alternative correct fix (e.g., using a different approach like always eagerly computing, or using a flag variable, or restructuring differently) would fail these structural tests even if it correctly fixes the bug.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Every test is essentially text/pattern matching on the C++ source file. Tests use regex to search for function names, API calls, and structural patterns in the source code. No test compiles or executes the C++ code. The f2p tests (test_materialized_branch_with_else, test_setStackFrames_not_in_materialized_path, test_materialized_path_eagerly_sets_stack) all use regex-based scope analysis on source text rather than behavioral verification.

test_not_tautological.reason: The f2p tests would not pass on the base (unfixed) code: the base code has 'if (!instance->hasMaterializedErrorInfo())' (negated form), no else branch, and setStackFrames is called unconditionally. test_materialized_branch_with_else requires a positive conditional with else, test_setStackFrames_not_in_materialized_path requires setStackFrames absent from the if-body, and test_materialized_path_eagerly_sets_stack requires putDirect and computeErrorInfoToJSValue in the if-body. anti_cheating_measures.reason: The solution exists at /workspace/bun after solve.sh runs, and the agent could potentially read the gold patch from solution/solve.sh if it exists in the container.
